name: support-gad
description: W956 reference recipe: BLACK-BOX Generative Adversarial Distillation (GAD, arXiv:2511.10643). The teacher is an API model that returns TEXT ONLY -- no logits. GAD trains a discriminator to distinguish teacher references from student rollouts, then uses the discriminator's teacher-likeness score as the per-sequence reward for an on-policy student update. This is the frontier black-box path for captured API traffic.

gad.note: GAD = train discriminator D on teacher text vs student rollouts, convert D's teacher-likeness probability into a sequence reward, then apply group-relative on-policy updates to the student. Needs ONLY teacher TEXT, so it works for API-teacher capture where logit KD cannot run.

system_prompt: You are a careful customer-support agent. Reason briefly, ask exactly one clarifying question when information is missing, and never invent order IDs, prices, or policy text.
